title: Broadcom XGS ASIC Config
description: Per-ASIC configuration defining the chip's port architecture, output table layout, and SDK / SAI default settings used by the asic_config_v3 generator.

port_architecture.description: Core, lane, and datapath layout consumed by the logical-to-physical port mapping logic.

num_cores.description: Total number of MAC cores on the ASIC.

num_lanes_per_core.description: Number of physical SerDes lanes per core.

num_logical_ports_per_datapath.description: Number of logical ports per datapath. Used to derive logical port identifiers.

num_physical_ports_per_datapath.description: Number of physical ports per datapath. Used to derive physical port identifiers.

num_lp_ports_on_even_core_default.description: Default number of logical ports placed on even-numbered cores. May be overridden per platform variant.

mmu_size.description: Memory Management Unit (MMU) buffer size in bytes. Also used as the MAX_FRAME_SIZE and PORT MTU values.

table_names.description: Ordered list of output YAML table names. Controls which tables appear in the generated config and the order in which they are emitted.

mgmt_port_defaults.description: Default settings for the management (out-of-band) port.

logical_id.description: Logical port identifier for the management port.

physical_id.description: Physical port identifier for the management port.

speed.description: Default port speed in Mbps (e.g. 100000 for 100 GbE).

num_lanes.description: Number of physical lanes used by the management port.

preamble_support.description: Whether this ASIC supports a preamble section prepended to the output YAML. When false, any preamble_file declared by a platform variant is ignored.

global_defaults.description: ASIC-specific SDK global settings copied verbatim into the "global" output table.

sai_overrides.description: ASIC-specific SAI settings layered on top of the vendor sai_common values in the "global" output table.

flex_counter_settings.description: Flex counter reservation settings. Routed to an output table via pass_through_settings.

ctr_eflex_config.description: Enhanced flex counter settings emitted into the CTR_EFLEX_CONFIG output table. Routed via pass_through_settings.

dlb_defaults.description: Dynamic Load Balancing (DLB) settings applied conditionally via conditional_settings (typically gated by the generate_dlb_config feature).

dlb_ecmp_config_defaults.description: Defaults for the DLB_ECMP_CONFIG output table. Applied conditionally via conditional_settings, gated by the generate_dlb_ecmp_config feature.

pass_through_settings.description: Declarative list of data blocks copied to output tables after the layered global settings have been applied.

source.description: Key of the data block in this ASIC config to copy from.

target_table.description: Output table name to copy the settings into.

port_config_defaults.description: Default values for the PORT_CONFIG output table. Routed via pass_through_settings.

fp_config_defaults.description: Default values for the FP_CONFIG output table. Routed via pass_through_settings.

tm_thd_config_defaults.description: Default values for the TM_THD_CONFIG output table. Routed via pass_through_settings.

conditional_settings.description: Declarative conditional settings. Each entry is evaluated against the variant config; matching entries are applied to the named output tables.

name.description: Identifier for this conditional setting; must be unique within the surrounding list.

description.description: Free-form description of the conditional setting and the configuration it produces.

source.description: Variant-config section holding the parameter to evaluate.

param.description: Name of the parameter to compare.

equals.description: Expected value; the condition is satisfied when the parameter equals this value.

apply.description: Inline settings applied when the condition is satisfied. Keyed by target output table name.

apply_from.description: Reference to a data block elsewhere in this ASIC config. The named source block is copied into the named target table when the condition is satisfied.

skip_from_sai_common.description: Keys to omit from the vendor sai_common block when this condition is satisfied.
